III)] ~~,~~ MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Dellii, the 23rdJanuary, 2013 S.O. 241(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 6 and Section 7 of the N ationai Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Bikram Singh Sajwan, Type-V Quarters, Helipad Road, P Sector, ltanagar, , Papum Pare, Arunachal Pradesh- 79lt 11, as the Expert Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from 7th January, 2013 for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty-five years, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 17(30)/2012-PUNGT(VoL Ill)] SURJIT SINGH, Jt. Secy. 343 GII2013 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi·l10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications. Delhi-l 10054. -- 1 of 1 --
